---
title: "BIOS 25328"
listing:
  contents:
    - "L*/page-*.qmd"
    - "post/*.qmd"
    - "post/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Course material for BIOS 25328 — Genomics and Bioinformatics (Hae Kyung Im).
